---
title: "Graph visualization using the metaphor of biological neural nets"
author:
  - name: Peter Mindek
  - name: Peter Kapec
date: "2011-01-01"
categories: [conference paper]
citation:
  type: paper-conference
  container-title: "Proceedings - SCCG 2011: 27th Spring Conference on Computer Graphics"
  doi: "10.1145/2461217.2461244"
  url: "https://doi.org/10.1145/2461217.2461244"
  isbn: "9781450319782"
  page: "141-148"
---

## Links

[DOI: 10.1145/2461217.2461244](https://doi.org/10.1145/2461217.2461244)
